Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to compute case durations: time from first Submit Claim to last Close Claim. List data: Case2001: Submit 09:00; Close 10:30 same day. Duration = 1.5h = 90 min. Case2002: Submit 09:05 Apr1; Close 11:00 Apr2. Thats 26h55m? Lets calculate: From Apr1 09:05 to Apr2 09:05 = 24h. Then to 11:00 adds 1h55m = 25h55m. Actually 09:05 to 11:00 next day = 25h55m. So duration ~25h55m. Case2003: Submit 09:10 Apr1; Close 09:30 Apr3. Thats 2 days + 0h20? Lets compute: Apr1 09:10 to Apr3 09:10 = 48h. Then to 09:30 adds 20m = 48h20m. Case2004: Submit 09:20 Apr1; Close 10:45 Apr1 same day: duration = 1h25m = 85m. Case2005: Submit 09:25 Apr1; Close 14:30 Apr4. Compute: Apr1 09:25 to Apr4 09:25 = 3 days = 72h. Then to 14:30 adds 5h5m = 77h5m. Thus longest durations: case2005 (~77h), case2003 (~48h20m), case2002 (~25h55m). Others ~1.5h.

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: We need to analyze attributes. Case durations by region: Cases 2001,2003,2004 are Region A? Lets see region column: 2001 A, 2002 B, 2003 A, 2004 B, 2005 B. So region A: 2001 (short), 2003 (long). Region B: 2002 (medium), 2004 (short), 2005 (very long). Both regions have outliers.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Resource: Look at resources per case: submitter: CSR names etc. Overall pattern? Cases with many Request Additional Documents repeats correlate with high duration: case2003 had 2 requests; case2005 had 3 requests; case2002 had 1 request but long due to 14h gap? Actually case2002 had 1 request but long due to overnight gap from 14:00 to next day 10:00 approve (20h).

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: So cause maybe resource Adjuster_Lisa? Cases 2002,2004,2005 have Adjuster_Lisa for evaluate and request docs; case2002 had long wait after request docs (14:00 to next day 10:00). case2005 also long but due to many requests and multiple days.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Complexity: Cases with High complexity: 2003,2005 (both long). Medium complexity 2002 (moderate). Low complexity 2001,2004 (short). So complexity appears strong predictor.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus root cause: high complexity leads to multiple requests for additional docs, causing delays, also possibly resource constraints (Adjuster workload). Region maybe less impact.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to propose explanations and suggestions: allocate more experienced adjusters for high complexity, streamline document request, set SLA for follow-up, parallel processing, automation, region balancing, cross-training, etc.
